stories.title: This Influential Alt-Rock Band Originally Chose to ‘Skew’ Their Sound on Purpose for a Brilliantly Practical Reason
bullets: The Pixies, an influential alt-rock band, intentionally skewed their sound in the '90s to align with the underground indie rock scene.
Their unique approach contributed to their lasting impact, with songs that challenged conventional rock norms and inspired future artists.
This strategic choice highlights the importance of authenticity in music, influencing the evolution of alternative rock.

stories.title: This App Lets You Use All Your AirPods' Features on Any Android
bullets: A new app allows Android users to access all features of AirPods, previously exclusive to iPhone users.
This development enhances user experience, enabling seamless integration of AirPods with various Android devices.
The app's release signifies a shift in accessory compatibility, expanding market reach and user accessibility.

stories.title: A Treatment for Pre-Eclampsia Could Be in Sight
bullets: Researchers are exploring a potential treatment for pre-eclampsia, a serious pregnancy complication affecting 5-8% of pregnancies.
The treatment is not a new drug but a novel approach that could significantly improve maternal and fetal health outcomes.
If successful, this could revolutionize prenatal care and reduce risks associated with pre-eclampsia.
